evals.prompt: Create a user story for resetting a forgotten password. Use the project template, ask me any clarifying questions first, then save it under spec/user-stories/ with the next available id.
evals.expected_output: A new user story file saved under spec/user-stories/ with BDD acceptance criteria and a Definition of Done.

evals.prompt: Based on spec/specs/index.md and any related files, create a user story for onboarding a new team member. Ask clarifying questions before writing, then save it to spec/user-stories/ with the next id.
evals.expected_output: A new user story file saved under spec/user-stories/ aligned with the template and BDD/DoD sections.
